title: Smart Leaf Decay
description: Enhances game performance by clearing leaf blocks after trees are chopped down.
body:
Auto Leaf Decay — For Performance and Cleanliness

This mod automatically removes leaf blocks after you chop down a tree, instantly clearing the area. No more waiting for natural decay or manually cleaning up floating foliage—keep your inventory and world tidy.

Key Benefits:

Boosts Performance: Reduces the number of rendered blocks, helping to decrease lag and increase FPS, especially in dense forests or during large-scale logging.

Saves Time & Effort: Instantly clears leaves to speed up wood gathering and prepare building sites faster.

Keeps Your World Tidy: Prevents accumulations of floating leaves, maintaining a neat and realistic landscape.

Simple & Reliable: Works automatically in the background with zero configuration or complex commands required.

How It Works:
When you break the bottom log of a tree, all connected leaf blocks within the natural decay radius are removed instantly. This mimics vanilla leaf decay behavior but eliminates the long wait.

Play more comfortably, build more efficiently, and explore without unnecessary visual clutter.
